title: Golden Ages Server Pack
description: A modpack created for the 1.21 version of the Golden Ages terrafirmacraft server.
body:
# This is a modpack for the 1.21 version of the Golden Ages server

The modpack is configured to be played on a larger timescale with other people. 

It contains TerraFirmaCraft and a few essential addons such as Cold Sweat (body temperature) & Kuba's TFC additions (more food options) that enhance the gameplay as well as QoL addons for TFC like Vessel Tooltip (quick and easy overview for alloying), Corpse mod (for item recovery), and the Weld Button (for easy in-GUI welding).

The modpack also features a few optimization mods that make the experience smoother overall as well as Distant Horizons which can be used for navigation. In addition to that there are a few mods that change animations such as Nyf's spiders (& spiders produce webs + cave spiders spawn) for more accurate and difficult experience while caving, and Vintage Animations to bring some variety to player characters.

This pack is required to join the server.
